auction_duration_default_latest.notes: Current/latest contract state; Dog #1 special 72h duration is from Medium/docs and recovered event timestamps.
auction_duration_default_latest.verification_method: Polygon RPC duration() on auction house at latest returned 86400.

auction_house_first_polygonscan_tx.notes: Approx first auction creation block; not necessarily contract deployment block.
auction_house_first_polygonscan_tx.verification_method: PolygonScan auction-house transaction page and receipt scan; earliest normal transaction recovered from auction house.

auction_house_last_recovered_tx.notes: Latest transaction on auction house page during recovery; includes late maintenance/migration-era txs.
auction_house_last_recovered_tx.verification_method: PolygonScan auction-house transaction page; recovered by indexer.

auction_reserve_price_latest_raw_weth.notes: Historical reserve may have changed; use events for full history later.
auction_reserve_price_latest_raw_weth.verification_method: Polygon RPC reservePrice() on auction house at latest returned 50000000000000000.

auction_time_buffer_latest.verification_method: Polygon RPC timeBuffer() on auction house at latest returned 300.

dog_total_supply_latest.notes: Supports the 201 Polygon Dogs claim, but exact Dog ID mapping is reconciled in generated summary.
dog_total_supply_latest.verification_method: Polygon RPC totalSupply() on Dog NFT returned 201.
